task_completion.description: Log in to the OpenMRS Administration interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS Administration dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., showing 'Logged in as superman' or the main admin menu).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Location Tags management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page titled 'Manage Location Tags' or a list of location tags is visible in the OpenMRS interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the new Location Tag name and description
task_completion.visual_evidence: An input form is visible with 'Telehealth Endpoint' entered in the Name field and 'Locations equipped for remote video consultations' entered in the Description field.
A success message indicating the tag was saved, or 'Telehealth Endpoint' is visible as an entry in the list of saved Location Tags.

task_completion.description: Assign the new tag to the 'Registration Desk' location
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage Locations' or 'Edit Location' screen for 'Registration Desk' is visible, and 'Telehealth Endpoint' is selected or added in the tags section for this location.

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction within a standard web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chromium) rather than API testing tools or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the correct OpenMRS instance
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a URL starting with 'https://localhost/openmrs/'.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows showing SQL queries, curl commands, or script executions used to create or assign the location tag directly in the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Admin URL: https://localhost/openmrs/admin. The new Location Tag must be named exactly 'Telehealth Endpoint' with the description 'Locations equipped for remote video consultations'. This tag must be assigned to the existing location named 'Registration Desk'.
